name: apa-eval
description: Tier-3 LLM-as-judge quality-eval harness for the Agent-Native-Patent-Artifact (APA) project. Paid, periodic (not per-commit). Calls the Anthropic Messages API with raw fetch (no SDK), obtains a structured verdict via forced tool use, runs a deterministic regex-before-LLM pre-pass to skip broken matters, and budget-gates on claim-quality regression or >2x cost growth. Zero dependencies, plain ESM, Node >=18. Human-in-the-loop; scores are drafts for a registered practitioner, never a legal opinion.
